## Proposed change

## Scope notes
- [ ] New data source? (bulk-first, public preferred — see ADR-001)
- [ ] New detection signal? (must be evidence-ranked + human-reviewed)
- [ ] Sealed-format / spec change? (additive vs breaking; see docs/spec)
